# Skill: Feature Definition
TRIGGERS: "define feature", "write feature spec", "feature definition"
ZONE: 2
USED BY: Define Feature agent
CONTEXT-TREE NODE: [DEFINE FEATURE]

## What this skill does
Ensures the feature spec captures the right information at the right level
of abstraction — enough for AC writing and decomposition, no more.

## Load on activation
- references/feature-spec-template.md
- references/definition-checklist.md

## Do not load
- references/decomposition-rules.md (belongs to feature-decomposition skill)
- Any task-level reference files
